items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: California-Earthquake-Forecasting-and-Analysis
items.description: A physics-informed machine learning framework for earthquake forecasting in California (1995-2025). This project integrates statistical seismology (Gutenberg-Richter law, Omori's Law) with XGBoost to identify predictive precursors to major seismic events.

items.name: Bayesian-Black-Litterman-with-Machine-Learned-Views
items.description: Authored a research paper developing a methodology to integrate machine learning return forecasts into the Black-Litterman portfolio construction framework, with a full Python backtesting implementation across an 11-asset multi-asset universe (2010-2024).

items.name: An-Explainable-Hybrid-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Fake-Job-Posting-Detection
items.description: Built an Explainable AI system for fake job posting detection using TF-IDF text features and credibility metadata. Trained and compared Random Forest, SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM, and stacking ensemble models. Used SHAP for model interpretability and deployed a real-time Streamlit application for fraud detection.

items.description: This project develops a comprehensive Machine Learning framework for predicting Peak Particle Velocity (PPV) from controlled blasting operations in Indian coal mines. It extends the traditional CMRI empirical formula with modern ML models, SHAP explainability, multi-output prediction, and a real-time safety intelligence dashboard.

items.name: PhaseLearner
items.description: PhaseLearner is a modular machine-learning framework for extracting phase structure from many-body simulation data. Designed for DQMC and lattice models, it implements dimensionality reduction, latent-space analysis, and physics-informed deep learning models to locate critical parameters, identify symmetry breaking, and characterize emergent order.

Utilizează Django REST Framework pentru backend, React cu Material UI pentru interfață și un model Machine Learning, mai exact XGBoost, pentru identificarea timpurie a riscului de stres la studenți. Include sistem multi-rol și management de date.

It uses TensorFlow.js for in-browser learning, supports real-time updates, and improves accuracy through correction-based adaptive training.

items.name: simple-ml-backprop

The implementation is then applied to train a basic multilayer perceptron (MLP) using gradient descent, without external machine learning frameworks.
